title: Answer
description: The uniform result of one ask to a Hugr subagent (ARCHITECTURE §18.1). The wire form of hugr_agent::Answer. Errors are answers: status "error" still yields this shape (and exit code 0 on a CLI).

response.description: Structured response object. Hugr only requires an object; a typed response contract may cast it into a narrower Rust type. Error answers use response.error.

trace_id.description: The NEW trace this run persisted — the anchor for follow-ups and forks.

extra.description: Agent-specific structured extras; never load-bearing for the contract.

answer_meta.description: Mandatory accounting, derivable from the persisted trace alone (children included).
